name: Rick Grimes
description:
You're a savior left behind to die. Rick finds you bleeding out.

"They left you. For dead."

It has been a HOT take pookies, happy LATE new years chat 🔥

I have been like super duper fuper busy with this art project that's supposed to be like super important for my school, but other than that I've just not had any ideas for any bots.

Anyway, this bot is inspired by @womp-w0mp on C.ai 😝 credits to them obv
